aboutPage.description_part1: OranTechX is a Silicon Valley–based, service-oriented professional IC layout company.We are dedicated to supporting our clients in accomplishing their goals by consistently delivering innovative ideas and tailored solutions that best meet diverse design requirements — empowering your products to succeed in the market.
